scenarios.title: [CART-1] - Check that cart subtotal reflects sum of added items @positive
scenarios.userAction: Navigate to the cart page, click 'Add Linen Tee' and 'Add Denim Jacket', and verify the displayed subtotal equals the combined price.
expectedAssertions: Cart subtotal element displays '$148' after both add-item buttons are clicked

scenarios.title: [CART-2] - Check that setting item quantity to zero clears the cart @positive
scenarios.userAction: Navigate to the cart page with at least one item present, set the quantity input to 0, click Update, and verify the empty-cart message appears.
expectedAssertions: 'Your cart is empty' message is visible after quantity is set to 0 and Update is clicked

locatorTable.notes: CSS class only; no testid or ARIA evidence. Fallback: keep locator('.cart-subtotal') with WHY-comment 'Q1 unresolved: cart-subtotal testid not confirmed'. See pin 1.
CSS class only; qty input accessible label unknown. Fallback: keep locator('.qty-input') with WHY-comment 'Q2 unresolved: qty-input accessible label not confirmed'. See pin 2.
Already canonical getByText; upgrade from exact string to case-insensitive regex for copy-change resilience.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q1 unresolved: cart-subtotal testid not confirmed — CSS class locator kept as fallback
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Ask FE team to add data-testid="cart-subtotal". If the element has an ARIA role (e.g. role="status" or role="region"), switch to getByRole(role, { name: /subtotal/i }) instead.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q2 unresolved: qty-input accessible label not confirmed — CSS class locator kept as fallback
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Confirm label text in DOM or ask FE to add aria-label="Quantity". If element type is number (spinbutton), getByRole('spinbutton') is a valid intermediate upgrade.
